title: Sitnasuak Native Corporation Board of Directors and Officer Positions
summary: The Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) 49 th Annual Meeting of Shareholders was virtually held on Saturday, June 25, 2022, for the election of three Directors with terms serving through the 52 nd Annual Meeting. title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: July 7, 2022
summary: July 7, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has now decreased by a higher rate of 6.09% from the level on 06/30/2022 of 9.695 M km 2 to 9.105 M km 2 for this week. title: Young Hunters – Walrus Summit
